title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Circle CEO touts USDC's network advantage as OUSD emerges
summary: Bernstein said OUSD could become the strongest new challenger to the Circle-Tether duopoly, while flagging unresolved questions around governance, operations and revenue sharing.

title: Nissan CEO Says It Still Makes Sense to Build Cars in US
summary: Nissan President and CEO Ivan Espinosa says it still makes sense to build cars in the US, despite trade tensions and a weaker yen. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Fall and Bond Yields Rise as Warsh in Focus: Markets Wrap
summary: Wall Street traders drove stocks lower and bond yields rose as Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh declined to offer clues on the path for interest rates.

title: President Donald Trump Discloses More Than $50 Million in Bitcoin Held in Cold Storage
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

President Donald Trump Discloses More Than $50 Million in Bitcoin Held in Cold Storage
President Donald Trump's 2025 financial disclosure revealed more than $50 million in self-custodied Bitcoin held in cold storage and over $1 billion in crypto-related reported revenue and proceed

title: Anchorage Digital and Binance Launch Off-Exchange Settlement for Institutional Crypto Trading
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Anchorage Digital and Binance Launch Off-Exchange Settlement for Institutional Crypto Trading
Anchorage Digital and Binance launched off-exchange settlement for institutional crypto trading, allowing institutions to trade on Binance while keeping their assets in segregated custody

title: Morning Minute: Major New Stablecoin Launch Shakes Incumbents
summary: Open USD takes a shot at USDC and USDT, with backing from heavy hitters including Visa, Mastercard and Google.

title: Taiwan Passes Sweeping Crypto Law With Licensing, Stablecoin Rules
summary: The new law puts virtual asset firms under FSC oversight for the first time and sets reserve-and-trust rules for stablecoins.

title: ‘We are bullish on Morpho’: Standard Chartered sees token at $60 by 2030, outperforming bitcoin and ether
summary: Standard Chartered forecasts Morpho at $60 by 2030, citing vault growth, TradFi adoption and a projected 37x DeFi expansion.

title: Panther Hollow launches multi-strategy merchant bank focused on compliant RWA and yield strategies
summary: Panther is a hybrid merchant bank, fund complex, and incubator focused on Ethereum, Canton, Solana, and StarkNet.

title: Donald Trump made more than $1bn last year in return to presidency
summary: US president also earned hundreds of thousands of dollars from licensing of Bibles, watches and perfume

title: Five things we learnt from Trump’s financial disclosure
summary: The US president earned more than $1bn from digital currency interests as well as real estate and stock trades
